name: Ritchie Torres
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $6,776,001 for Ritchie Torres in U.S. House, NY-15. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
